commit.message:
Fix entry duplication by preserving client-generated UUIDs in all POST routes

When client sends an id in the POST body, use it as the record id instead of
letting the server generate a new one. Prevents sync engine from creating
duplicate records in IndexedDB.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

test: add unit tests for ClientRelationships and ClientPermissions (#24)

- tests/unit/test_client_relationships.gd: covers fetch_relationships
  (populates cache, skips disconnected/null client, API failure),
  get_relationship, is_user_blocked, get_friends/blocked/pending
  filter methods, and send_friend_request/block_user/remove_friend/

- tests/unit/test_client_permissions.gd: covers has_permission
  (admin/owner bypass, role grants, imposter mode) and
  has_channel_permission (everyone/role/user overwrites, ADMINISTRATOR
  bypass, no-members fallback).

Closes DAC-123, DAC-124.

commit.message:
Add Prompt RCT experiment framework for blind prompt variant comparison (#75)

Flask CLI command group (`flask rct`) with 5 subcommands: estimate, generate,
evaluate, aggregate, run-all. Reuses existing LLMProvider, cost calculation,
and Node model. Fully resumable, self-contained cost tracking (no DB writes).
CLI registration is conditional so Docker/staging aren't affected.

commit.message:
Fix: Proper date parsing for all Google Sheets date formats

- Normalize dates to ISO 8601 at sync time in google-sheets.ts so Redis
  always contains clean, reliably parseable date strings. Handles:
  · Standard formats (ISO, M/D/YYYY, M/D/YYYY H:MM:SS)
  · 12-hour AM/PM format ("3/9/2026 2:30:00 PM") — Node.js can't parse this
  · DD/MM/YYYY format when day > 12 (e.g. "27/02/2026") — Node.js fails too

- Stale client alert now shows the date of the last meeting-ready lead
  next to each client name, making it clear whether the alert is real or
  still a false positive.

- After a Refresh sync the new normalized dates take effect immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resolve 409 sync conflict and text node render crash

- users/sync: handle P2002 by claiming the existing email record for the
  new Clerk user ID instead of erroring (covers dev DB reuse / account
  recreation scenarios)
- toMockEvent: use || instead of ?? for optional string fields so empty
  strings from the DB coerce to undefined, preventing the React Native
  "Unexpected text node cannot be a child of a View" crash when
  slotDuration, recurringDescription, or instagramHandle is ''

commit.message:
Clarify WINDOWS_SANDBOX.md: fix is to epic, not lot

WRITE_DAC requirement is inherent to AppContainer — lot cannot
avoid it. Epic should stop requesting system directories it
doesn't need, which eliminates the elevation requirement.

commit.message:
feat: Notebook + Kalendář – 3 vylepšení v2.51.11

1) Kalendář/Poznámky – auto-save: NotePanel nyní automaticky ukládá
   po 1s nečinnosti (debounce) a okamžitě při opuštění editoru.
   Přidán saveTimerRef, triggerAutoSave(), localTasksRef; všechny
   akce úkolů (toggle/update/add/remove) triggerují auto-save.
   handleBlur s relatedTarget guard zabraňuje zbytečnému linkify
   při pohybu focusu uvnitř panelu.

2) Poznámky/Kódový blok – min-height: <pre> blok má nově
   min-height:2.5em takže po kliknutí (smazání placeholderu)
   výška neskolabuje. Opraveno v NoteEditor i CalEventNoteEditor.

3) Poznámky/Inline task bloky: Nové tlačítko v toolbaru (checklist
   ikona) vkládá blok úkolů kamkoliv do textu poznámky přes
   document.execCommand('insertHTML'). Více bloků v jedné poznámce.
   Enter = nový úkol, Backspace na prázdném = smazat položku.
   Kliknutí na ☐/☑ přepíná stav, × maže položku, + přidává.
   CSS: nb-tb-del fade-in on hover, nb-tb-txt placeholder.
   htmlToPlainText extrahuje inline task bloky DOM-based.
   relatedTarget guard v handleEditorBlur/handleBlur zabraňuje
   korupci DOM při přechodu mezi nb-tb-txt elementy.
   Funguje konzistentně v NoteEditor, CalEventNoteEditor i NotePanel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: stop leaking Resend API errors to subscribe clients

Raw error bodies from Resend (including status codes and potentially
sensitive details) were returned directly to the browser. Now logs
the full error server-side and returns a generic message to the client.

commit.message:
fix: preserve digests when aborting a run

delete_run removed the date-keyed digest row, but on re-runs the
upsert overwrites run_id -- so aborting would destroy a previous
day's digest that happened to share the date. Digests are published
content and should survive run cleanup.

commit.message:
fix: replace HTML regex stripping with BeautifulSoup in prepare_for_web

The feedback div regex assumed exactly one nesting level and would
break silently if the structure changed. DOM parsing handles arbitrary
nesting correctly. Replaced all regex-based element removal with
CSS selectors via bs4 (lxml was already a transitive dep via premailer).

commit.message:
fix: strip dark mode CSS before extracting :root variables

If the dark-mode :root block appeared before the light-mode one,
we'd resolve to dark values for email. Stripping the @media
(prefers-color-scheme) block first guarantees light mode extraction.

commit.message:
fix: use dotall match for style tag regex

[^<]+ breaks if CSS ever contains a < character (e.g. in content
strings). Non-greedy .*? with DOTALL handles arbitrary content safely.

commit.message:
Fix calendar display showing UTC times instead of academy timezone

FullCalendar CDN bundle doesn't support named timezones (requires
moment-timezone plugin). Events were displaying in UTC (e.g., 3 PM
instead of 6 PM KSA).

Fix: convert UTC event times to academy-local strings in JS before
passing to FullCalendar, and set timeZone:'UTC' so FC displays as-is.
Drag-and-drop sends academy-local bare datetimes, backend parses in
academy timezone and converts to UTC for storage.

Major features added:
- Admin Portal with dashboard, RBAC settings, system health monitoring
- Manager Portal with team management, approvals, calendar, attendance
- Keycloak SSO authentication support (server + client)
- Portal switcher for multi-role users
- Audit logs viewer with filtering
- Payroll history and status tracking
- Attendance regularization endpoints
- Employee movements and exit checklist
- Leave encashment and bulk approval
- Shift management and holiday configuration
- Salary components and structures
- Reimbursements management
- Job levels and approval hierarchy
- Notification preferences
- Error and loading states for all portals

UI improvements:
- Dark mode theme for dashboard portals (FundFlow style)
- Light mode for auth pages
- Enhanced card, button, badge, modal components

commit.message:
Fix: Parse AM/PM date format from Google Sheets in Node.js

Node.js cannot parse 12-hour AM/PM datetime strings (e.g. "3/9/2026 2:30:00 PM")
that Google Sheets commonly returns, while browsers handle them fine. This caused
parseDate() to return null for those leads, making clients with AM/PM-formatted
reply dates incorrectly appear in the stale clients alert.

commit.message:
Add SPARK chat panel to web dashboard

Conversational interface for talking to SPARK directly from the browser.
Users can ask about learning status, predictions, cross-connector patterns,
and get evidence-backed responses with expandable reasoning steps.

Features:
- Chat message thread with user/SPARK avatars and animations
- Typing indicator while SPARK processes queries
- Expandable reasoning evidence (rule ID, description, confidence)
- Suggestion chips that update based on SPARK's follow-up recommendations
- New Chat button to reset conversation context
- Responsive layout (mobile-friendly)
- Dark/light theme support via existing CSS variables

Also fixes: SPARK data fetch URLs used undefined `API` variable,
now correctly uses `API_BASE + '/api/...'` pattern matching rest of codebase.

+524 lines across 3 files (index.html, app.js, style.css)

commit.message:
Fix AppImage release race: use softprops/action-gh-release

Both appimage and release-debs workflows upload to the same GitHub
Release on tag push. The raw `gh release upload` fails if the release
doesn't exist yet. Replace with softprops/action-gh-release which is
idempotent — creates if missing, appends if existing.

commit.message:
fix: add UUID validation guard in ipdShiftService to prevent dev-mode console errors

Dev auth uses non-UUID IDs (e.g. "dev-admin-001") which cause Supabase
query failures on UUID columns. Added isValidUUID() guard on
resolveStaffContext, getNurseRecordForUser, and getMyShiftAssignments
to skip DB queries gracefully when user ID is not a valid UUID.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: use DB preheader column instead of scraping stored HTML

get_digest now queries the preheader column directly and constructs
the OG title from digest_name + date, eliminating fragile HTML string
parsing. Removes extract_between helper. Adds inject() wrapper that
logs a warning when HTML replacement targets are missing, surfacing
template drift instead of silently dropping nav/footer elements.
